title: In-Port Watchkeeping Operation
summary: Cargo, gangway, security, and mooring surveillance guidance for port operations.

excerpts.heading: In-port watch rounds
excerpts.summary: Check moorings, gangway safety, draft, security, and pollution prevention measures during each round.
excerpts.body: The in-port watch shall inspect mooring tension, gangway condition, security posture, draft marks, and any signs of pollution or unsafe cargo operation.

excerpts.heading: Gangway and visitor control
excerpts.summary: Keep gangway watch records, verify lighting, and control visitors alongside.
excerpts.body: Maintain gangway watch records, verify safe access and lighting, and ensure all visitors and shore personnel follow security control measures.
